example_tasks: Remove duplicate contacts from address book
Disable screen mirroring on the living room TV
Clean up duplicate files in the Downloads folder
Stop sharing screen after the presentation ends
Consolidate duplicate entries in the database
Turn off dual-screen mode on the workstation
Delete cloned git repositories that are obsolete
Disable picture-in-picture mode in the video player
Turn off external projector in the conference room
poor_matches: Share screen with the design team
Set up dual monitors for coding
Clone the production database to staging
reasoning: The icon clearly depicts two overlapping screens or windows with a diagonal slash, representing the disabling of screen mirroring, split-screen, or duplication. It is useful for tasks involving de-duplication, disconnecting displays, or stopping screen sharing.
